memberdef.argsstring: (fl A, fl B, fl C, fl D)
memberdef.name: Quaternion

briefdescription.para: Construct quaternion with real then unreal components.
Return the real or scalar part.
The Cayley norm - the square of the Euclidean norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (fl x, fl y, fl z) const
memberdef.name: rotate

memberdef.argsstring: (fl x, fl y, fl z, float3 center, float3 translate) const
memberdef.name: transform

briefdescription.para: Rotate around the provided center and translate.
Quaternion class for rotations. Single precision only.
